query: sodium vapor street light orange yellow night photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — sodium vapor street light cast, orange/yellow night tint

response.objective_caption: A nighttime view of a steel through-arch bridge illuminated by overhead streetlights. Elongated red and white light trails from passing vehicles stretch horizontally across the left side of the frame. A circular traffic sign mounted on a black-and-white striped pole stands in the left foreground. The geometric steel trusswork and suspension cables rise against the dark sky, while a paved pedestrian walkway with metal railings curves gently along the right side of the bridge toward the distant horizon.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime long-exposure photograph of a steel through-arch bridge featuring intentional motion blur that renders passing vehicle lights as elongated red and white streaks across the left side. A sickly orange sodium-vapor color cast permeates the entire scene, tinting the steel structure, walkway, and streetlights with an unhealthy warm hue. Bright overhead lamps illuminate the geometric trusswork against the dark sky. A circular traffic sign on a black-and-white striped pole stands in the left foreground, while a concrete pedestrian path with metal handrails runs along the right, curving gently toward the distant end of the span.
